objective: When onboarding finishes with AI-plan choice, generate the user's initial workout plan through the agent tool loop (workout tools + user_get_profile for personalization), replacing the current legacy /api/workouts/generate dashboard trigger.
current_state_findings: Onboarding sends profile payload including plan_choice/custom_plan in src/pages/Onboarding.jsx.
User profile schema currently does not define plan_choice/custom_plan, so these are not reliably persisted in server/models/User.js.
Workout generation is currently legacy and dashboard-triggered via POST /api/workouts/generate in src/pages/Dashboard.jsx.
Agent/tool loop exists and is production-wired via ChatBrainService + ToolExecutor.
Workout tools currently have read/edit/log/swap, but no create tool for initial plan creation.
hard_requirements: Planner execution must happen server-side only.
Planner must execute via workout tools (not direct model writes inside planner prompt path).
Planner may use user_get_profile (read-only) to retrieve user profile details for personalization.
User scope must remain enforced via tool context userId.
Mutations must keep idempotency + audit behavior.
design_decisions: Add a workout creation tool (workouts_create_workout) so onboarding agent can create plan records through the same governed tool pipeline.
Add planner-specific tool allowlist support so onboarding planner can run workout tools plus user_get_profile.
Keep user tool access read-only in onboarding planner scope (no user_edit_profile).
Move trigger from dashboard auto-generation to backend onboarding completion path (register/update profile).
Keep a controlled fallback path if AI planning fails (status + retry endpoint).

phases.name: Profile/Onboarding Contract Fix
changes: Extend User.profile schema with onboarding planning fields: plan_choice, custom_plan, workout_plan_status, workout_plan_error, workout_plan_generated_at, workout_plan_source.
Persist plan_choice from onboarding payload so backend can decide AI vs existing plan path.

phases.name: Workout Creation Tool
changes: Implement workouts_create_workout in workouts tool handler with strict zod/json schema.
Require idempotencyKey for write calls.
Return sanitized workout object.
Rely on existing ToolExecutor idempotency + audit pipeline.

phases.name: Planner Tool-Scoping Support
changes: Add optional tool allowlist to ChatBrainService request input.
Thread allowlist through ToolExecutor.listToolsForModel and ToolRegistry.listForModel.
Use this to expose only workout tools + user_get_profile during onboarding planning.

phases.name: Onboarding Workout Planner Service
changes: Create a dedicated service to call ChatBrainService with onboarding context and planner system prompt.
Planner should fetch user profile via user_get_profile before plan generation when profile context is incomplete.
Prompt constraints: must create workouts via workouts_create_workout, respect frequency/session_duration/environment/injuries/goal/experience.
Planner call config: higher tool-call budget than chat default, persistSummary=false.

phases.name: Backend Trigger Integration
changes: In registerUser and updateProfile, when onboarding_completed=true and plan_choice='ai' and no existing plan, invoke onboarding planner service.
Set profile.workout_plan_status transitions: pending -> generating -> ready/failed.
Set profile.has_existing_plan=true only after successful tool-created plan.
Store profile.workout_plan_error on failure for UI retry messaging.

phases.name: Frontend Flow Switch
changes: Remove legacy dashboard auto-call to POST /api/workouts/generate.
Read workout_plan_status from user profile to show generating/failure states.
Keep dashboard workout fetch behavior unchanged once plan is ready.

phases.name: Retry and Operations
changes: Add protected endpoint to retry onboarding plan generation for failed/pending edge cases.
Use requestId-based idempotency key prefixing in planner tool calls.
Add logs around planner start/end/failure with requestId/userId/provider.

phases.name: Test Coverage
changes: Unit tests: workouts_create_workout validation, auth scoping, idempotency replay.
Integration tests: onboarding planner tool scope includes user_get_profile and excludes user_edit_profile.
Integration tests: registration/updateProfile with plan_choice='ai' triggers planner and persists workouts.
Regression tests: non-AI path and existing-routine path do not trigger planner.

acceptance_criteria: New user finishing onboarding with AI option gets workouts created via tool execution (audited), without dashboard /generate call.
Generated workouts are correctly scoped to that user and visible in dashboard.
No duplicate plans on retries due to idempotency keys.
Planner failures are visible in profile status and can be retried.
Existing chat agent behavior remains unchanged for normal coach chat.
